title: Nature Scavenger Hunt
description: A sensory scavenger hunt that invites children to find real-world treasures by texture, color, shape, size, and sound.
learningGoals: Use sensory vocabulary for texture, color, shape, and size
Pay close attention to details outdoors
Categorize real-world objects by observable qualities
Explain why a find belongs in a category
interactionModel: follow spoken find missions, explore the real world, then tap the large completed step and show why the treasure counts
feedbackModel: hushed spoken encouragement with sparkle/tick/tada SFX; explanations and careful noticing are celebrated over correctness

modes.title: Five Finds
modes.skill: categorizing nature finds by sensory quality
